name: ExtensionAccount_BillingStatus
title: R5: Tracks the lifecycle of the account through the billing process (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Account.billingStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Account.billingStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Account.billingStatus` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Account.billingStatus` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.billingStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Tracks the lifecycle of the account through the billing process (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.billingStatus` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.billingStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Tracks the lifecycle of the account through the billing process
element.definition: The BillingStatus tracks the lifecycle of the account through the billing process. It indicates how transactions are treated when they are allocated to the account.

binding.description: Indicates whether the account is available to be used for billing purposes.
